summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Field Service Route Optimization app. Backend APIs are mostly functional (92.3% success rate) but frontend has critical React runtime errors preventing proper UI rendering.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 error when creating new job with valid data
React runtime error: 'Failed to execute removeChild on Node: The node to be removed is not a child of this node'
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents entire React app from rendering - users see error overlay instead of application

critical_bugs.issue: Direct DOM manipulation (innerHTML='') conflicts with React's virtual DOM management
critical_bugs.impact: Causes React reconciliation errors and app crashes

integration_issues.issue: Map initialization fails with 401 errors due to invalid API key, contributing to React errors

ui_bugs.issue: No UI elements render due to React error boundary activation
ui_bugs.impact: Complete frontend non-functional - sidebar, navigation, pages not accessible

success_percentage: Backend: 92.3%, Frontend: 0% (completely non-functional due to React errors)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix React DOM manipulation errors in MapView component. The app currently shows error overlay instead of UI. Issues: 1) Remove direct DOM manipulation (innerHTML='') from MapView component 2) Use React refs and proper lifecycle methods for map container 3) Handle Nextbillion map integration without conflicting with React's DOM management 4) Add proper error boundaries for map component failures 5) Fix POST /api/jobs 520 error
